entries.name: Assist Gift
entries.description: In Holo-Battle Interlink, help other Twiners raise their Current Best Star Rank to earn Assist Gifts. In a single dungeon challenge, Twiners whose Star Rank does not increase are counted as Assisting Players. At settlement, they receive 1 Assist Gift for every 5 Stars gained by the team member with the largest Current Best Star Rank increase (rounded up)

entries.name: Alpha Shelly Egg
entries.description: An Egg gifted by a young Sherro. It seems to carry a familiar, comforting presence. With extraordinary size and energy fluctuations, it is guaranteed to hatch into a Shelly with the Alpha trait . They say an Aniimo's passing is different from a person's death. Aniimo are born from Idyll, and to Idyll they return. Perhaps to the stars, the woods, or the sea... After they return, this land gives rise to new Eggs. Then, as new lives, they meet us again

entries.description: Charred rock formed by the flames of certain Aniimo. Charstone fragments can also be obtained while mining Ferric Charstone

entries.name: Common Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing Common Power. Despite its common look, the shard contains a mysterious power that can balance other powers. There is nothing special on its surface yet touching it makes you feel comfortable and complete

entries.name: Coral Branch
entries.description: Fresh branches naturally shed from coral clusters. Their vivid offshoots contain the natural pigments favored by Popapus. Reefish are captivated by the satisfying crunch when biting into them and often use the branches to file down their teeth

entries.name: Dark Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing the power of Dark Element. The black mysterious shard seems to have the ability of swallowing light

entries.name: Dawndelion Aromathyst
entries.description: Commonly used as a perfume-making plant in Bloomville. They symbolize friendship and companionship. The pink and yellow flowers always grow together, allowing their nectar to have two different tastes

entries.name: Dream Iris Aromathyst
entries.description: Commonly used as a perfume-making plant in Bloomville. They symbolize passion and first love. It's believed that wooing with Dream Irises guarantees unwavering love, making them the most popular flowers among youngsters

entries.name: Duskwhisper Aromathyst
entries.description: Common perfume-making herb from Bloomville. They symbolize waiting and longing. People returning home after a long trip will know that Bloomville is just ahead when they appear on the horizon

entries.name: Earth Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing the power of Earth Element. It came from the soil beneath an ancient forest untouched by sunlight, full of the essence of the earth, symbolizing the endless cycle of life and growth

entries.name: Emberbud Aromathyst
entries.description: Aromathyst brewed from Emberbuds by Dewies. The burning traces exude the sweet aroma of caramel while the fine golden sand flows across the facets within like an everlasting sunset

entries.name: Ether Heart

entries.name: Unbroken Flameruff Spirit
entries.description: To grow stronger, to rise above all—this is the Emberpups' birthright. The fiercest Flameruffs battle in the Thousand-Ridge Fang, seeking to transcend their limits and claim the title of Scorchhowl. But victory is rare. Defeated, their bodies become Ridgeback Trees, while their spirits linger, tormented by the strength they could never grasp

entries.name: (Old) Clovis’s Diary
entries.description: Old Clovis’s diary, detailing his studies of the Life Force Seeds and his regrets toward young Clovis

entries.description: The hair band old Clovis gave to Alpha Irisal. A symbol of their friendship that started when they were young and lasted their whole lives

entries.name: Aimo Core
entries.description: A self-aware AI born from the holographic system

entries.name: Ancestor Cube
entries.description: A ceremonial object discovered in an underground temple, protected by a powerful Aniimo. Mysterious divine patterns cover its surface, with faint images and text visible within its core, their meaning still undeciphered. Principal Oswen notes that it has appeared several times throughout Idyll mythology, each appearance signaling imminent transformation. Like a mysterious cosmic die that determines the land’s destiny and initiates new chapters in history. The nature of changes it brings this time awaits discovery by Pathfinders

entries.name: Ancient Recipe
entries.description: A very ancient recipe, written in the ancient Idyllian language, now mostly faded. Luckily BINI can translate it: Offer the fragrance of life and growth, and the Aeons shall grant the blessing of regeneration. Offer the fragrance of tolerance and change, and the Aeons shall grant the blessing of protection. Offer the fragrance of courage and passion, and the Aeons shall grant the blessing of hope

entries.name: Aromapudding
entries.description: A velvety pudding infused with Fragrancia. Each spoonful brings silky sweetness and aromatic bliss that lingers long after

entries.name: Binding Oath
entries.description: “From the moment we twined, we became each other’s greatest friend.” This is an eternal and binding oath

entries.name: Bittersweet Dew
entries.description: Dew gathered from bittersweet blooms. Imbued with both sorrow and happiness, it exudes a complex, layered fragrance. The perfumer Fantine is searching for it in Driftwise Meadow

entries.name: Bloomville Invitation Gift
entries.description: A specially treated flower used for decoration and perfume. It never withers and always gives off a wonderful fragrance. During the Bloom Festival, Bloomville gives it to invited guests as a keepsake

entries.description: If a Fentuft gives you a joyous tuftball, that means it wants you to be happy!

entries.description: Lewis’s Final Answer

entries.name: Life Force Seed
entries.description: A six-hued seed, infused with the legendary Irisal’s life essence. They placed the seed upon their dying friend, hoping to prolong his fleeting breath, but they could not rekindle what was lost. Some say it’s these very failures that paint existence in richer shades

entries.name: Lycus’s Diary
entries.description: This treasured diary was Lycus's emotional compass, documenting not just his spiritual journey across the grasslands, but also his connections with family and friends. Between its pages lies a profound truth about their world

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 1
entries.description: To the Thornblade guards, Princess Melloblum is the fairest blossom of their lineage, a treasure demanding meticulous protection. While all revere her, the First Lethal Thorn recognizes that this attention suffocates her. Yet these Thornblades, who wear their duty as honor, never pause to consider Melloblum's own desires

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 2
entries.description: Two little Budsquires, raised in the Maze of Thorns, knew the dangers of the outside world. Yet still, they longed to see it. Even if the thorns cut them, even if the pain made them weep, they kept reaching higher, desperate for a glimpse of the world beyond

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 3
entries.description: "Banished" from the princess's tea party, the observant Budsquires noticed Princess Melloblum's subdued spirits. The First Lethal Thorn's intervention, meant as protection, had only deepened her quiet distress. Where the Budsquires could release their pain in tears, the princess swallowed her tears, aware that her moods affected the entire court. The radiant figure who brought smiles to others wore none of her own

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 4
entries.description: The previous Princess Melloblum had exhausted herself for her people's happiness—a sacrifice that haunted the former First Lethal Thorn with guilt. So it trained its apprentice to become the perfect guardian: one who could detect and eliminate any danger to the princess without hesitation. But years later, it realized its mistake. "Thorns hardened by tears grow unyielding, yet lose their scent." A First Lethal Thorn that knew nothing of joy could only bring sorrow to those it sought to protect

entries.name: Melancholic Fluff
entries.description: If even sadness must be hidden... isn’t that... something rather sad in itself?

entries.name: Midnight Concert Invitation

entries.name: Mint

entries.name: Morphling - Mask Fragment

entries.name: Pale Thorn
entries.description: The Thunderstorm Thornblade has hard thorns and a ruthless heart. She shows no mercy to her challengers in defeating them and breaking off their thorns. Perhaps she was born this way, or maybe her nature changed after she lost her brother. Once an innocent flower, it was on that rainy night she blossomed the flower of mourning in her deepest sorrow, and since then, ruthless thorns began to grow on her. Given the choice, she would have preferred to stay with her brother, remaining as a couple of ordinary Budsquires they once were, or to have started sharpening her thorn as early as possible, so she could have defended her loved ones

entries.name: Peace of Mind
entries.description: "I'll be thinking of them, but knowing that everybody is alright is good enough for me."

entries.name: Super Truffle
entries.description: A precious material found in the Mistwoods, full of a distinct fragrance unique to life itself. One of the important ingredients for crafting the legendary incense offered to Aeon

entries.name: Susuta Shovel
entries.description: Susuta's shell shovel. With a wooden handle and a shell-made scoop, it is proof that Aniimo in this world can make tools of their own. Susuta use it to dig up beautiful shells and stones, then offer them to potential mates. With someone cute watching, a Susuta could probably dig straight through Idyll with this shovel

entries.name: Symphony of Reunion
entries.description: The gulf between life and death stretches beyond the vast distance starlight travels to reach us. Yet within this Echoback's song rings a symphony of joyous reunion. Their convergence in paint was fated, for no tide could ever wash away their eternal bond. All rivers return to the sea as the memories flows through each current

So it dug itself deep into the soil in an attempt to secure peace and comfort. Yet its agitation only grew, and it started to “lose hair.” So it hid the fallen roots from its kin

entries.name: "Freedom" Score
entries.description: Half of the music score was created by Bloomville perfumer Lyris and the legendary band, the Windgliders. It sings of the sea and freedom. After Lyris left, the band lacked the inspiration to finish it, so they left Argent Strait and flew across the sea to find a way to complete the score

entries.name: A Letter
entries.description: Perfumer Zephyro and his partner Flutternym wished to fly across the sea. But without the wind, the Flutternym couldn't make it. So they waited for the great wind when the Bell of Freedom bloomed. Later, the wind came and they rode on it

entries.name: Anonymous Research Notes
entries.description: A research note scattered along the outer fringes of Thousand-Fang Ridge. Someone at the Outpost might know something about it

entries.name: Archival Chip - Bolty Call Logs
entries.description: The Bolties of Blitzwood believe electricity can connect all things—even hearts. That is why they love communicating via these electric “calls”, even when standing face to face. You just so happened to overhear them, and clever BINI recorded the whole conversation

entries.name: Archival Chip - Helgon Cave Mural
entries.description: A Helgon, a Rookey, and an Infergon are chatting in a circle, while Helmuts and Jawlings are sleeping on the ground. One of the Jawlings even has its teeth on a Helmut’s helmet... Someone recorded all this in an ancient language. Maybe a long time ago, Helmuts and Jawlings were friends

entries.name: Archival Chip - Mural of Infergon's Birth
entries.description: Long ago, the mountains of Russet Highlands heaved and burned, and the earth shook so violently that the Aniimo living there suffered total devastation. Then one Helmwhelp climbed to the summit. Through searing pain, it swallowed a Flame Flower blooming alone in the raging fire. The mountains finally fell silent. But the Helmwhelp's shell had been scorched blood-red, and from that day on, it could breathe roaring flame. Thus, the legendary Infergon was born

entries.name: Archival Chip - Sayn’s Manuscript
entries.description: Sayn’s masterpiece. He is so proud of this manuscript, and claims it perfectly captures the Inferlupa’s true form

entries.name: Archival Chip - Tracks of Berylline Causeway
entries.description: The right track began with a mistake. The perfect legend began with an accident

entries.name: Archival Chip - Tucker's Promise
entries.description: Young Selens wore a Glimmer Fruit Garland, convinced he had passed for his ancestor, and called out to Tucker to use the "Beautiful Singing Perfume" with him. But Tucker knew instantly that this boy was not the partner from long ago. Instead, it read the message left behind a century earlier: Sorry, my friend. I can't keep our promise

entries.name: Bonesky Family Research I
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Bonesky family

entries.name: Bonesky Family Research II
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Bonesky family

entries.name: Bonesky Family Research III
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Bonesky family

entries.name: Canid Battle Bone
entries.description: A bone infused with the Glynsera Recas’s fighting spirit. A chill radiates from it, along with an unmistakable warrior’s will

entries.name: Fists
entries.description: The flame from Icho's fist carries its past—and everything it has come to understand about what battle truly means

entries.name: New “Freedom” Score
entries.description: One half of the music score was created by Bloomville perfumer Lyris and the legendary band, the Windgliders. It sings of the sea and freedom. After Lyris left, the band lacked the inspiration to finish it, so they left Argent Strait and flew across the sea to find a way to complete the score. The other half was finished by you and the makeshift Windgliders, and it carries the free spirit of every glider

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter's Notes
entries.description: The corrosion suggests this notebook has survived for a very long time. The handwriting changes from young and uncertain, to steady and practiced, then faint with age. It traces the life of its writer, but the stories it carries belong to more than him alone

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter’s Notes II
entries.description: What was once a complete notebook has now become scattered pages. The varying degree of damage and different handwriting among the pages suggest that they were written at different times across a long period. Perhaps the writer was not very diligent, leaving behind only a handful of entries over the years. Yet these fragments are traces of his time—weathered but vivid. And more than that... this is hardly just his story alone

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter’s Notes III
entries.description: What was once a complete notebook has now become scattered pages. The varying degree of damage and different handwriting among the pages suggest that they were written at different times across a long period. Perhaps the writer was not very diligent, leaving behind only a handful of entries over the years. Yet these fragments are traces of his time—weathered but vivid. And more than that... this is hardly just his story alone

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter’s Notes IV
entries.description: What was once a complete notebook has now become scattered pages. The varying degree of damage and different handwriting among the pages suggest that they were written at different times across a long period. Perhaps the writer was not very diligent, leaving behind only a handful of entries over the years. Yet these fragments are traces of his time—weathered but vivid. And more than that... this is hardly just his story alone

entries.name: Perfumer's Memoirs (Part 1)
entries.description: It was once a complete notebook. Now, only scattered pages remain. Nearly a century later, you pick them up and read them one by one, and it feels as though the old days are unfolding right before your eyes

entries.name: Perfumer's Memoirs (Part 2)
entries.description: It was once a complete notebook. Now, only scattered pages remain. Nearly a century later, you pick them up and read them one by one, and it feels as though the old days are unfolding right before your eyes

entries.name: Perfumer's Memoirs (Part 3)
entries.description: It was once a complete notebook. Now, only scattered pages remain. Nearly a century later, you pick them up and read them one by one, and it feels as though the old days are unfolding right before your eyes

entries.name: Spirit Dust: Ghost Glynsera
entries.description: The Ghost Glynsera’s Spirit Dust. Its heart lies buried in dust—its hatred refuses to fade

entries.name: Spirit Dust: Inferlupa
entries.description: Inferlupa’s Spirit Dust. As the dust settles, its fighting spirit rekindles

entries.name: Spirit Dust: Old Inferlupa
entries.description: Old Inferlupa’s Spirit Dust. As the dust settles, its fighting spirit rekindles

entries.name: Spirit Dust: Restrained Inferlupa
entries.description: Restrained Inferlupa’s Spirit Dust. As the dust settles, its fighting spirit rekindles

entries.name: Strange Findings on Trombers
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of a certain Tromber

entries.name: Tenacious Fang
entries.description: Formed from the Alpha Scorchhowl’s unyielding will. It embodies his understanding of what it means to be a warrior

entries.name: Trader’s Memoirs
entries.description: Everyone carries many faraway places in their heart. A mountain still waiting to be crossed. A sea at the end of the road. A brighter sun. A time they have never known. If you keep running, you can reach those distant places—even places beyond distance itself. But not everyone can return to that one place. The place where everything began. The place that still smells like home. The place where old friends wait, and where the past never fades

entries.name: Lumin Amber - Whisperwake Isles
entries.description: These highly pure energy ambers originated from the overflowing Vein energy and have been refined over the ages. The power they contain is so intense that it can illuminate the surroundings, which earned it the name Lumin

obtain_methods.label: Lumin Energy
obtain_methods.detail: Lumin Marking Explore Idyll and collect Lumin Energy

obtain_methods.detail: Repair Vein nodes in sanctums
